title: Tracking device (Sith Empire)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Device |image=[[File:Beep.jpg]] |name=Tracking device |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Homing beacon/Legends|Tracking device]] |culture= |creators= |created= |modifier= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners=[[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] |locations=''[[Starbreaker 12]]'' |cost= |value= |structure= |size= |material= |length= |width= |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range=Across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] |inscription= |markings= |purpose= |heritage= |affiliation=[[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] }} {{Quote|We have the precise coordinates from our tracking device… like a gleaming beacon guiding us through the galactic wasteland.|Naga Sadow, on the eve of the Great Hyperspace War|[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]]}} A '''tracking device''' was used by [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] during the [[Golden Age of the Sith|golden age]] of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] to trail the location of the ''[[Starbreaker 12]]''. The device sent precise coordinates of its location in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] back to Naga Sadow, and the transmitter's signal was eventually locked onto by Sadow's [[Sith invasion fleet]] in [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]], where the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] waged [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|war]] against the Republic. ==Description== {{Quote|BEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEP|The sound of the device|[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]]}} The beacon was green and dark blue in [[Color/Legends|color]]. When active, the tracer made a continuous "beep" sound. ==History== {{Quote|Lord Naga Sadow we have locked onto the signal from the ''Starbreaker 12''.''"
"''The beacon hidden on the ship has led us to the Republic at last!|A member of the Sith fleet and Naga Sadow speak through [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]|}} The tracking device was planted on the ''[[Starbreaker 12]]'', the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] explorers [[Jori Daragon|Jori]] and [[Gav Daragon]], by [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] in the latter's attempt to conquer the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The ''Starbreaker 12'', with its sole [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] being Jori Daragon, was sent by Sadow from the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] during its [[Golden Age of the Sith|golden age]] back to Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]], allowing the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to gain direct access to the Republic. Crossing the fabric of hyperspace, Naga Sadow's [[Sith invasion fleet]] trailed the ''Starbreaker 12''{{'s}} tracer to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|heart]] of Republic space, leading to the outbreak of the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. ==Behind the scenes== The tracking device appears in [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]]. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 1]] {{Mo}} {{1stID|transmitter}} {{1stID|tracer}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] {{Mo}} {{1stID|tracking device}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] {{Mo}} {{1stID|beacon}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Homing beacons]] [[Category:Sithspawn]]
